title: Tunisian Ginger Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish, made with chicken, ginger, and a blend of spices.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
5. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
6. Add the minced ginger and garlic to the skillet and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
7. Stir in the Tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
8. Add the chicken broth and honey to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
9. Return the chicken to the skillet and transfer it to the preheated oven.
10. Bake until the chicken is cooked through and the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C), about 20-25 minutes.
11. Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
